Text:
I built a free retro game collection tracker for collectors who care about more than a checklist.

Retro Vault Elite tracks owned games, wanted grails, loose vs complete-in-box value, paid prices, favourites, and console completion across classic libraries.

I would genuinely love feedback from retro collectors. What would make you use this instead of a spreadsheet?

https://www.retrovaultelite.com/?utm_source=buffer&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=collector_feedback
